classObjective: Write two-column, paragraph, and flow proofs to prove triangle congruence using the SSS and SAS postulates.
workedExamples: 14-3, Example 1 — Write Proofs Using the SSS Postulate
14-3, Example 2 — Determine Triangle Congruence on the Coordinate Plane Using SSS
warmUp: What does SSS stand for in triangle congruence?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: SSS with shared sides/midpoints; Distance Formula on coordinate plane; SSS and SAS proof structure
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing SSS and SAS proofs
independentPractice: Practice problems writing proofs using SSS and SAS postulates
assessment: Exit ticket: write a two-column proof using SSS to show triangles are congruent
capReflection: Why is SSS sufficient to prove triangle congruence without knowing any angles?
